Tests if the constructor of Boolean.prototype is Boolean.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the constructor property of the `Boolean` prototype. It verifies that `Boolean.prototype.constructor` is equal to the `Boolean` function itself. This assertion ensures that the `Boolean` prototype is correctly linked to its constructor, which is a fundamental aspect of JavaScript's prototype-based inheritance. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating this specific relationship within the JavaScript language.
